sitehealth.name: SITEHEALTH
sitehealth.description: Monitors page titles, meta descriptions, OG tags, canonicals, GA4 coverage, and newsletter forms across all 157 pages

plan.reactive: Auto-fixes title length, meta descriptions, missing OG tags, and freshness dates on every scan
plan.strategic: Targeting 100% compliance: all titles under 60 chars, all meta descriptions 120-160 chars, OG tags on every page

revenuefunnel.name: REVENUEFUNNEL
revenuefunnel.description: Ensures every product link routes through /go/ affiliate redirects — protects revenue by catching direct vendor link leaks

plan.reactive: Scans all pages for new direct vendor links and auto-converts to /go/ redirects
plan.strategic: Maintaining 100% /go/ coverage across 1,314 affiliate links on 149 pages

linkhealth.name: LINKHEALTH
linkhealth.description: Maps the internal link graph, finds orphaned pages with too few inbound links, and identifies cross-linking opportunities
linkhealth.lastAction: Mapped 7945 internal links across 157 pages. 80 orphans, 0 cross-link gaps.

plan.reactive: Flags any page that drops below 3 inbound links as an orphan alert
plan.strategic: Building toward full cross-link coverage: every comparison page linked from both tool reviews and category hubs

priceverify.name: PRICEVERIFY
priceverify.description: Compares prices on every page against review pages (source of truth) and auto-corrects mismatches

plan.reactive: Auto-fixes any price mismatch found between review pages and all other page types
plan.strategic: Monitoring 33 tools across 149 pages — targeting zero price inconsistencies site-wide

contentguard.name: CONTENTGUARD
contentguard.description: Scans for name leaks, banned marketing phrases, rating mismatches, demo CTA errors, schema issues, and thin content

plan.reactive: Auto-replaces banned phrases, fixes demo CTA text for 8 demo-only tools, and detects name leaks (highest priority)
plan.strategic: Eliminating all marketing slop and ensuring every page has complete, valid JSON-LD structured data

seopower.name: SEOPOWER
seopower.description: Scores every page on title optimization, meta descriptions, freshness signals, keyword placement, and schema coverage

plan.reactive: Auto-adds year freshness to comparison titles, auto-trims over-length titles by removing filler words
plan.strategic: Pushing all 143 scored pages above 80/100 — currently at 79.4 average with 107 pages above 80

trafficintel.name: TRAFFICINTEL
trafficintel.description: Calculates commercial intent, competition proxy, and content quality for every page to rank revenue potential

plan.reactive: Re-scores all pages on each run to detect quality drops or improvements
plan.strategic: Identifying which pages to invest in for maximum affiliate revenue — pricing pages lead at 68/100 revenue potential

contentengine.name: CONTENTENGINE
contentengine.description: Finds content gaps — missing comparisons, best-picks pages, and alternatives pages — and generates publication-ready briefs
contentengine.lastAction: Content gap analysis complete: 466 comparison gaps, 21 alternatives gaps

plan.reactive: Re-scans for new gaps as tools are added or pages are published
plan.strategic: Top 3 opportunities: Best B2B Data Providers (7 tools), Best AI Tools for SDRs (5 tools), Best Email Warmup Tools (5 tools)

revenueops.name: REVENUEOPS
revenueops.description: Strategic command layer — aggregates all agent data, tracks affiliate inventory, calculates concentration risk, and prioritizes weekly actions
revenueops.lastAction: Affiliate inventory built: 51 slugs, 590 total links

plan.reactive: Re-prioritizes action queue based on latest agent scores and new issues found
plan.strategic: Driving overall score from 88 toward 95+ by resolving remaining cross-link gaps and publishing high-value content briefs
